narrative:
Huntington Twp township has 3,549 registered voters, with 63.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a clear Republican lean of 7.2 percentage points.
